Table-Command: CREATE TABLE EnergyPrice(EnergyPriceId INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,CurrentDate DATETIME,BestTimeToBuy INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,BestTimeToSell INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,FOREIGN KEY(BestTimeToBuy) REFERENCES DateAndPrice(DatePriceId),FOREIGN KEY(BestTimeToSell) REFERENCES DateAndPrice(DatePriceId),PRIMARY KEY(EnergyPriceId));

CREATE TABLE DateAndPrice(DatePriceId INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,Date DATETIME,Price FLOAT,EnergyPriceId INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,FOREIGN KEY(EnergyPriceId) REFERENCES EnergyPrice(EnergyPriceId),PRIMARY KEY(DatePriceId));
